top_signals.title: Gold Holds Above $4,500 as Iran Deal Hopes Ease Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold held a gain after reports that the US and Iran had reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the Middle East war eased inflation concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent reiterates ‘no CBDC’ commitment under Trump admin
top_signals.summary: During a Thursday press briefing, Bessent also urged the House and the Senate to get the Clarity Act to the finish line.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
